$schema_note: BPC price-sheet skeleton populated for PAIS — Backcountry Cabin Roof Repairs (140P6026Q0029). Mirrors RFQ Section B Schedule of Prices: 3 base CLINs (0001, 0002, 0003) + 2 optional CLINs (Option 001, Option 002). Every CLIN must be priced (leaving any blank is non-responsive per Section L). Best-value SAP — bid bond NOT required (see compliance_attestations).

project.name: PAIS — Backcountry Cabin Roof Repairs
project.agency: U.S. Department of the Interior, National Park Service (NPS) — Padre Island National Seashore

schedule_of_prices.description: Door repair + corrosion-resistant reinforcement + new keyed deadbolts (3 exterior doors)
Roof leak repair — like-kind shingle replacement, sealant, stainless fasteners
schedule_of_prices.notes: [USER TO FILL — extent of damage caps assumption; see 01-scope.md]

schedule_of_prices.description: Furnish + install ten (10) Bahama-style TDI Category 5 hurricane shutters w/ manual operation + lockable hardware
schedule_of_prices.notes: [USER TO FILL after ≥3 sub quotes received; engineer-stamped TDI CAT5 product data required]

schedule_of_prices.description: Construct ramp extension on existing cabin deck — two new wood landings + integration of GFE aluminum ramp
schedule_of_prices.notes: [USER TO FILL — confirm GFE specs at site visit; PT lumber + SS/HDG fasteners; ADA slope assumed]

schedule_of_prices.description: Construct breakaway 2x10 PT lumber sand-control enclosure on three sides of raised cabin perimeter
schedule_of_prices.notes: [USER TO FILL — verify perimeter LF at site visit; confirm which 3 of 4 sides via RFI #3]

alternates.description: RFQ does not request alternates. Section B has only base + 2 options structure. If proposing 'or-equal' substitutes (e.g. alternate TDI shutter brand) per FAR 52.211-6, do NOT add an alternate line — instead include 'or-equal' product literature in the QUOTE PACKAGE per Section L Part C.

unit_prices_owner_directed_changes.item: Additional shutter (single TDI CAT5 Bahama unit, installed)
unit_prices_owner_directed_changes.notes: Set high — change-order ceiling. Volume of 10 in base; if Govt directs +1 / +2 in-flight, this rate governs. Includes engineer-stamped product data + install labor.
Same kit as CLIN 0001. Set high.
If actual damage extent at the site visit reveals more shingle replacement than CLIN 0002 LS contemplates, this unit rate provides a clear change-order mechanism. Set high — backcountry premium.
Add-LF rate for Option 002 if perimeter measurement at site visit exceeds takeoff.

unit_prices_owner_directed_changes.item: BPC mobilization to/from site (round trip Frisco ↔ Corpus Christi backcountry)
unit_prices_owner_directed_changes.notes: If a punch-list re-mobilization is directed > 30 days post substantial completion.

totals.total_evaluated_note: Section M evaluation considers 'price' = total of base CLINs + exercised options, but per Section M, evaluation 'will consider all price information offered.' Submit total of base + both options as the headline TEP; show base + option subtotals separately for clarity.

compliance_attestations.every_clin_priced_note: Flip to true once all 5 lines (3 base + 2 option) are non-zero.
compliance_attestations.bid_bond_required_note: FAR 52.228-1 NOT invoked. Best-value SAP under FAR Part 13 — no bid bond at submission. Post-award Payment Bond OR Irrevocable Letter of Credit (FAR 52.228-13) required within 10 days of award.
compliance_attestations.no_exceptions_note: Cover letter / transmittal must NOT take exception to any RFQ term. Best-value SAP scoring penalizes exception-taking the same as LPTA does.
addenda_acknowledged: SF-30 Amd 0001 (2026-05-20) — site visit + due-date extension
compliance_attestations.addenda_acknowledged_note: Re-check SAM.gov for additional amendments at Due-3 (6/15) and Due-1 (6/17). Add Amd 0002+ here if posted.
compliance_attestations.sam_reps_certs_clause: FAR 52.204-19 (incorporates SAM Reps + Certs by reference)
compliance_attestations.buy_american_clause: FAR 52.225-9 / FAR 52.225-11 (BPC compliant unless 'or-equal' triggers a foreign-construction-material certificate)
section_k_required_provisions: FAR 52.203-18 (Anti-Kickback, contractor employee responsibility) — applies to all contractors > simplified threshold; complete YES/NO
FAR 52.209-11 (Tax delinquency / felony conviction representation) — applies; complete YES/NO
FAR 52.209-13 (Violation of Tax Laws representation) — applies; complete YES/NO
FAR 52.219-1 Alt I (SBA size representation) — incorporated via 52.204-19 / SAM
compliance_attestations.contractor_core_data_block_note: Required by Section L Part C.6. Include UEI + CAGE + legal entity name + POC + email + phone.
